◎简　　介  

　　The triumvirate of tenors blend classical arias with an encore round of popular Italian ballads in this concert special from the Musicale Fiorentino Teatro Opera in Rome. Experience the emotion, the excitement and the triumph of the greatest classical event of our time, captured as never before in studio-quality vision and spectacular 5-channel surround sound!Recorded in Rome ...
